summary: Tested iWhistle Brand Style Guide v2.0 rebranding changes. All brand-related requirements are fully implemented and verified via Playwright browser automation. No 'Basketball Reff' or 'Basketball Referee Manager' text found anywhere in the app. All iWhistle brand colors, fonts, and branding elements are applied correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. All branding changes are correctly implemented.
React Router v6 future flag warnings present in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - these are non-breaking warnings, only informational.
From previous iteration (iteration_6): demoDataService.js loadStore() still missing refereeAvailability backfill guard - carry-over action item from iteration_6 that has not yet been addressed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: iWhistle Brand Style Guide v2.0 rebranding is complete and fully functional. Font is Arial. Colors are brand-blue #0080C8, brand-deep #003D7A, brand-orange #FF8C00. No Basketball Reff or Basketball Referee Manager text anywhere. All nav active states use E6F2F8 background with #0080C8 text. Login page has iWhistle logo, title, LEADERSHIP UNDER PRESSURE tagline. Landing page has Leadership Under Pressure hero heading. Note: carry-over issue from iteration_6 - demoDataService.js loadStore() missing refereeAvailability backfill guard still unresolved.
